from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import DataFrame
import json
import re

spark: SparkSession = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
storage_account: str = mssparkutils.notebook.run('/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account')
print(storage_account)
foldername="MiPINS/SAP_HR_Weekly"
config="Hr-raw-stb-config.json"
source_path: str = f"abfss://odw-raw@{storage_account}{foldername}/"
config_file_path: str=f"abfss://odw-config@{storage_account}{config}"
print(source_path)
print(config_file_path)

# List all items in the directory
items = mssparkutils.fs.ls(source_path)

# Filter for directories and get their names and modification times
folders = [(item.name, item.modifyTime) for item in items if item.isDir]

# Sort folders by modification time in descending order
sorted_folders = sorted(folders, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

# Get the name of the latest modified folder
if sorted_folders:
    latest_folder = sorted_folders[0][0]
    lates_folde_path=f"{source_path}{latest_folder}/"
    print(f"Latest modified folder: {latest_folder}")
    print(lates_folde_path)
else:
    print("No folders found in the specified directory.")

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

# Initialize Spark Session
spark = SparkSession.builder \
    .appName("Read Config JSON") \
    .getOrCreate()

# Read configuration file from Azure Data Lake Storage
config_df = spark.read.json("abfss://odw-config@pinsstodwdevuks9h80mb.dfs.core.windows.net/Hr-raw-stb-config.json")

# Convert the DataFrame to a dictionary
try:
    # Ensure the DataFrame is not empty
    if config_df.count() == 0:
        raise ValueError("Configuration DataFrame is empty. Please check the config file path.")
    
    # Extract the first row as a dictionary
    config = config_df.collect()[0].asDict()

    # Access configuration parameters
    excel_filename = config.get('excel_filename', '*.xlsx')
    print(f"Excel Filename: {excel_filename}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f"An error occurred: {e}")

finally:
    spark.stop()

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

# Initialize Spark Session
spark = SparkSession.builder \
    .appName("Read JSON from Azure Data Lake") \
    .getOrCreate()

# Path to the JSON file in Azure Data Lake Storage
json_file_path = "abfss://odw-config@pinsstodwdevuks9h80mb.dfs.core.windows.net/orchestration/orchestration.json"

try:
    # Read the JSON file into a DataFrame
    df = spark.read.option("multiline", "true").json(json_file_path)

    # Display the schema of the DataFrame
    df.printSchema()

    # Show the contents of the DataFrame
    df.show(truncate=False)

except Exception as e:
    print(f"An error occurred: {e}")

finally:
    spark.stop()

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit, current_timestamp
from datetime import datetime
import traceback

# Initialize Spark Session
spark = SparkSession.builder \
    .appName("Excel to Synapse Table") \
    .config("spark.jars.packages", "com.crealytics:spark-excel_2.12:3.3.1") \
    .getOrCreate()

try:
    # Read configuration file from Azure Data Lake Storage
    config_df = spark.read.json(config_file_path)
    
    # Check if config_df is empty
    if config_df.isEmpty():
        raise ValueError("Configuration DataFrame is empty. Please check the config file path.")

    config = config_df.collect()[0].asDict()

    # Extract Configuration Parameters
    excel_filename = config.get('excel_filename', '*.xlsx')
    sheet_name = config.get('sheet_name', 'Sheet1')
    target_table = config.get('target_table', 'default_table')
    container = config.get('container')
    storage_account = config.get('storage_account')
    latest_folder_path = config.get('latest_folder_path')

    # Construct Excel File Path
    excel_path = f"{latest_folder_path}{excel_filename}"
    print(excel_path)

    # Read Excel Files with Specific Sheet
    excel_df = spark.read.format("com.crealytics.spark.excel") \
        .option("header", "true") \
        .option("inferSchema", "true") \
        .option("sheetName", sheet_name) \
        .load(excel_path)

storage_acc = mssparkutils.notebook.run('/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account') # ends in / 
linked_service = "ls_storage"
db_name = "odw_standardised_db"

raw_container = "abfss://temp-sap-hr-data@" + storage_acc
raw_source_folder = ""
raw_name = "Addresses - 20221107_chris_changes.xlsx"

delta_lake_table_name = "addresses"
standardised_container = 'abfss://odw-standardised@' + storage_acc
standardised_source_folder = "HR/" + delta_lake_table_name + "/"
standardised_name = raw_name.split(".xlsx")[0] + '.snappy.parquet'


sheet_name = 0
header_row = 0

validate_parameters(storage_acc, raw_container, raw_source_folder, raw_name, standardised_container, standardised_source_folder, standardised_name, linked_service, sheet_name=0, header_row=0)
ingest_excel_to_parquet(storage_acc, raw_container, raw_source_folder, raw_name, standardised_container, standardised_source_folder, standardised_name, linked_service)
enable_delta_on_parquet(standardised_container, standardised_source_folder)
lakedb_table_sparksql(db_name,delta_lake_table_name,standardised_container, standardised_source_folder)
